close_reason: Completed: helper extraction finalized across train_dynamic/training_helpers/training_session and validated by full suite (1007 passed, 11 skipped).
description: Complete a major refactor of train_dynamic.py and its related script files to create highly modularized and more maintainable code.
notes:
Modular refactor is mid-flight. Current blocker: syntax/scoping instability in DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/training_step.py and DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/training_loop.py after extraction.
Progress: Restored canonical DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/train_dynamic.py content/path, fixed training_session circular import and setup contract, and validated with targeted tests plus full suite (1002 passed, 11 skipped).
- Extracted stable helper logic from train_dynamic into new module DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/training_helpers.py.
- train_dynamic now uses compatibility wrappers delegating to training_helpers for _build_setup_panel_line, curriculum_schedule, _clip_gan_scores, and _is_vad_train_reg_enabled.
- training_setup now imports helper functions directly from training_helpers for reduced coupling.
- Validation: targeted tests passed (test_loss_audit_fixes.py + test_train_dynamic_reexports.py); full suite passed via task Run Tests: 1002 passed, 11 skipped.
- Added targeted tests in DeepFilterNet/tests/test_training_helpers.py covering extracted helper behavior and wrapper equivalence.
- Targeted validation now passes: test_training_helpers.py + test_loss_audit_fixes.py + test_train_dynamic_reexports.py (33 passed).
- Full suite re-run after test additions: 1002 passed, 11 skipped.
- Re-ran full suite with fresh log to avoid stale task output: .venv/bin/python -m pytest DeepFilterNet/tests/ -q --tb=short
- Current post-change result: 1007 passed, 11 skipped, 20 warnings.
title: Refactor train_dynamic.py
